mapper.update: UPDATE photography_activity SET status = 3, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, -- 总报名人数（所有状态） COUNT(ap.id) AS apply_count, -- 已通过人数（只统计 status=1） COUNT(CASE WHEN ap.status = 1 THEN 1 END) AS current_participants
FROM photography_activity a LEFT JOIN activity_application ap ON a.id = ap.activity_id
WHERE a.status = 0 GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
